description.unified: Leaps and deals ??? Physical DMG to enemies within range, and stuns them for [5 sec->2sec].

Deals ??? Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their [All DEF by 30%->ATK by 24%] and ATK Spd by [500->18%] for [20 sec->4sec]. [(removed) When Clause successfully blocks an attack, reduces this Skill's Cooldown by 0.5 sec].

For [20 sec->17sec], increases P.DEF of the [all allies->4allies with the lowest P.DEF] by ???, increases their [P.Crit Resistance by 300->P.Block Chance by 140], and reduces P.DMG taken by [25%->11%].

On Block, deals ??? Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by [20%->4%] for [8 sec->6sec], and increases your Physical DEF by [(added) 6%] [(removed) recovers own Mana by 300]. These effects stack up to 4 times. [(removed) When an ally excluding self takes DMG, increases all allies' P.DEF by 20% and P.Crit Resistance by 200 for 5 sec. This effect only activates once every 10 sec].

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1000->2000], but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.unified: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec [(removed) Target takes 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec].

dark.unified: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by [250->110].

light.unified: On block, the Attack reduction effect and Physical Defense increase effect are changed to stack up to 6 times [(removed) Increases All DMG the hit target takes by 20% for 10 sec and has 10 sec Cooldown].

dark.unified: Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec [(removed) Reduce an additional 10% of ATK].

description.unified: [Cut Ground] [reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 1 sec->Increases All DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec, and recovers own Mana by 400 per every hit enemy].
[Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by [(added) 25%] and their [All Crit Resistance->P.Crit Resist] by [500->{0}] for [10 sec->4 sec] [(removed) Crit Chance reduction].
[Guardian Shield] Removes negative effects from self and increases DEF boost by {0}%.
[Vow of Knights] recovers [2% of Max HP->{0}% of Max HP] and increases the duration of own P.DEF by [5 sec->3 sec].

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' [ATK by 15%->Max HP by 4%]. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 3 Skill uses, increases P.DEF of [all allies->the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF] by {0}% and ATK by {1}% for 15 sec.

Summons the soul of the Guardian, Exian for 12sec, increasing P.DEF of all allies by [70%->24%]. During the duration, Normal Attacks stun the target for 1sec and reduce its [All DEF by 7%->P.DEF by 6%] for 5sec. This DEF reduction stacks up to 5 times.

1.from: Upon activation, reduces P.DMG the ally with the highest ATK takes by 80% and increases that ally's ATK by 100% of Clause's P.DEF for 12 sec. This effect is irremovable.
1.to: Upon activation, for 12 sec, reduces P.DMG taken by the 4 allies with the lowest P.DEF by 36% and increases their ATK by 100% of Clause’s P.DEF. This effect cannot be dispelled.
1.unified: Upon activation, for 12 sec, reduces P.DMG taken by the [ally with the highest ATK->4 allies with the lowest P.DEF] by [80%->36%] and increases their ATK by 100% of Clause’s P.DEF. This effect cannot be dispelled.

2.from: Upon activation, increases DMG the ally with the highest ATK deals by 15% for 12 sec. Clause's normal attacks increase All DMG the target takes by 20% for 5 sec.
2.to: Upon activation, for 12 sec, increases DMG dealt by the 4 allies with the lowest P.DEF by 7%, and Normal Attacks change the target’s P.DEF reduction to {3}%.
2.unified: Upon activation, for 12 sec, increases DMG dealt by the [ally with the highest ATK by 15%->4 allies with the lowest P.DEF by 7%], and Normal Attacks change the target’s [All DMG taken by 20%->P.DEF reduction to {3}%].
